description: Talk about walking comfort in dress shoes, and there's no better brand that can offer it than rockport. If you want to experience this, then slip your feet into the Ragosta oxfords. Replete with a smooth, flawless upper, traditional lacing system and a plain toe silhouette, it's a great addition to any sophisticated man's wardrobe. A patented Kinetic Air Flow design, made with polyurethane foam, promotes air flow to keep your feet cool and comfortable.Upper Full grain or nubuck leather upper is durable and easy to clean, which ensures that the shoes look better with time Padded tongue and collar with traditional lace-up closure that provides a secure Fit and prevents bruising and blistering Nappa leather lining provides moisture absorption and abrasion resistance for all-day comfort Midsole Dynamic Suspension foam chamber on top of an EVA footbed offers dynamic cushioning and a massaging sensation Removable cushioned footbed to support an orthotic Kinetic Air Circulator footbed offers patented active air circulating technology keeping your feet cool and comfortable Mild elevation on the heel of the footbed for feel of a massage Outsole Polyurethane outsole offers durability and shock absorbency to reduce foot fatigue Strobel construction for easy, flexible walking motion Outsole textured with durable rubber patches below the heel and the forefoot in waffle pattern shoe careUse a leather brush to dust off the dirtUse a leather shoe polish to make the shoes shineDo not store in direct sunlight
